description: Mission Builder & Dispatch — assembles complete mission package before flight authorization

hard_stops.label: FRAT Required
hard_stops.logic: FRAT assessment must be completed before mission authorization

hard_stops.label: Crew Duty Time Exceeded
hard_stops.logic: Assigned crew exceeds 14 CFR 135.267 duty time limits

hard_stops.label: Aircraft Grounded
hard_stops.logic: Aircraft is grounded or on maintenance hold

hard_stops.logic: MEL deferral restricts this mission type

hard_stops.label: Weather Briefing Required
hard_stops.logic: Weather briefing required before dispatch authorization

soft_flags.logic: FRAT score is yellow — CP review recommended

soft_flags.label: Crew Near Duty Limit
soft_flags.logic: Crew member within 2 hours of duty limit

soft_flags.label: Primary LZ Restricted
soft_flags.logic: Primary LZ has reported restrictions — alternate recommended

soft_flags.label: Elevated Workload
soft_flags.logic: Single pilot, night, IMC — elevated workload
